UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile in the Sunshine application.

uid.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity, corresponds to Firebase Auth UID.

name.description: The full name of the user.

rol.description: The role of the user within the application, always 'user'.

saldoUSDT.description: The user's available wallet balance in USDT, used for making new investments.

totalInvested.description: The sum of all active investments a user currently has.

retirosTotales.description: The total amount of all withdrawals made by the user.

invitadoPor.description: Reference to the sponsor's UserProfile UID.

inviteCode.description: The user's own unique invitation code to share with others.

ultimoCheckIn.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp of the user's last daily check-in.

walletAddress.description: The user's unique USDT (BEP-20) wallet address.

bonoDirecto.description: The accumulated amount of direct referral bonuses in USDT.

bonoRetirable.description: The portion of bonuses that is currently available for withdrawal.

hasUnclaimedBonuses.description: Flag indicating if the user has made a new investment that the sponsor can claim a bonus for.

fechaRegistro.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp of when the user account was created.

lastConsolidation.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp of the last time earnings were consolidated.

tickets.description: The number of casino tickets the user owns.

lastTicketClaim.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp of the user's last daily ticket claim.

Investment.title: Investment
Investment.description: Represents a single active investment plan for a user.

startDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the investment was activated.

dailyRate.description: The daily percentage rate for this investment (e.g., 0.02 for 2%).

earningsGenerated.description: Total earnings generated by this specific investment.

status.description: The current status of the investment.

bonusPaid.description: Whether the direct referral bonus for this investment has been paid out.

InvitationCode.title: InvitationCode
InvitationCode.description: Represents a legacy invitation code. This is being phased out.

WalletAddress.title: WalletAddress
WalletAddress.description: Ensures wallet address uniqueness. The document ID is the wallet address string.

InviteCodeMap.title: InviteCodeMap
InviteCodeMap.description: Maps a user's unique invite code to their user ID.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Represents a single financial transaction in a user's history.

MinesGame.title: MinesGame
MinesGame.description: Represents a single session of the Mines game.

CrashGame.title: CrashGame
CrashGame.description: Represents a single session of the Crash game 'El Vuelo del León'.

crashPoint.description: The multiplier at which the game crashes.

cashOutMultiplier.description: The multiplier at which the user cashed out.

BalloonGame.title: BalloonGame
BalloonGame.description: Represents a single session of the Balloon game 'El Balón de Oro'.

burstPoint.description: The multiplier at which the balloon bursts.

cashOutMultiplier.description: The multiplier at which the user cashed out.

/users/{userId}/investments/{investmentI.description: Stores individual investment plans for a user.

/users/{userId}/transacciones/{transacti.description: Stores the transaction history for a single user.

/users/{userId}/mines_games/{gameId}.description: Stores individual Mines game sessions for a user.

/users/{userId}/crash_games/{gameId}.description: Stores individual Crash game sessions for a user.

/users/{userId}/balloon_games/{gameId}.description: Stores individual Balloon game sessions for a user.

/wallet_addresses/{walletAddressId}.description: Stores unique wallet addresses to prevent multi-accounting. Document ID is the address.

/invite_codes_map/{inviteCodeId}.description: Maps a user's public invite code to their UID for sponsor lookups.
